description:
The quiz assesses knowledge of JavaScript's advanced features such as interfaces (via TypeScript or design patterns), Symbol usage, and property enumerability. It is positioned at an intermediate difficulty, using a casual, encouraging tone to motivate learners to demonstrate their skill without barriers.
Topics: JavaScript interfaces (TypeScript typings, duck typing), Symbol primitive and well‑known symbols, Enumerable vs non‑enumerable properties, Object property descriptors, ES6+ language features
Audience: Developers with basic JavaScript experience who want to validate and deepen their understanding of modern language constructs, especially front‑end engineers and full‑stack developers.
